method: 12-agent classification workflow over 208 functions after flow-disassembling the indirect-dispatch gap (39 -> 211 fns)

variant_delta.summary: normal and speed are the same firmware; the only functional difference is one charge-control parameter plus version/size metadata
sites: movs r0,#0x69 immediate feeding the charge state machine at 0x000031e4 (FUN_00003150 path, via FUN_00001d38)

charger_app.name: charge_state_init
charger_app.note: seed charge-config struct: fullscale 1e6, setpoint 0x0a03, limit 3

charger_app.name: compute_charge_profile_setpoints
charger_app.note: period-divisor search 0x181..2; picks current limits 0x2ee/800/0x36b into a 4-byte frame

charger_app.name: compute_charge_current_limit
charger_app.note: voltage derate (x*28000>>16) + 10-entry temperature breakpoint table, *0x22ee scaling

charger_app.name: build_charger_can_reports
charger_app.note: pack ADC/status into CAN frames via Tx-enqueue FUN_1474

charger_app.name: charge_event_dispatch
charger_app.note: event codes 1/2/4/8/0x10 -> states 9/10/0x30; post (1,5), CAN tx

charger_app.name: write_identity_config_record
charger_app.note: checksum records (hdr 0x13/0x11), commit 0x200 page to flash @0xfe00

charger_app.name: charge_state_dispatch
charger_app.note: states 1/2/5/10; enable/disable charge; arms M_CAN Tx FUN_1d38(0x69) <- VARIANT PARAM

charger_app.name: set_charge_status_flag
charger_app.note: status bit FSM (8/0x10/0x20); 0x20 -> completion when state==5

charger_app.name: charge_state_machine_step
charger_app.note: core FSM: states 0/1/2/3/5/10, timeout counters, fault posts (0,0xd,1)

charger_app.name: set_charge_mode
charger_app.note: on change of bits 0x18 trigger transition FUN_3270(2)

charger_app.name: write_identity_block
charger_app.note: flash-erase + checksum + 504-byte config image @0xfc00 + version/param fields

charger_app.name: charge_state_dispatch_b
charger_app.note: tbb jump-table dispatch via function-pointer table

charger_app.name: select_charge_setpoint
charger_app.note: threshold measured values, pick temperature/current breakpoint

charger_app.name: get_version_id
charger_app.note: returns immediate 0x110e (device/version id, NOT a string)

charger_app.name: charge_step_finalize
charger_app.note: orchestrate charge step: event(4), checks, post

charger_app.name: process_command_record
charger_app.note: command-record handler; gates on flag bits +0xc, dispatches sub-handlers

deferred_vendor_notes.vendor-hal: Bosch M_CAN driver + register accessors (0x2c62-0x3023, 0x4ce0-0x50c7), clock/GPIO bring-up (0x4f2a/0x4f76), flash self-program (0x1e64)
